issues.claim: Analog does not contradict traditional meaning
issues.objection: 4.36 engineering layer stays within the operational shadow of the verse and tags STRETCHED honestly where the metaphysics exceeds it; the verse's full reach is preserved at source-pack level via Shankara and Ramanuja's verbatim quotes. The doctrinal moves of the verse are tracked, not flattened.

notes: Distortion test for 4.36: cross-check the engineering analog against the four-tradition source-pack. Engineering body is consistent with the convergent floor; STRETCHED tagged where any tradition's full reach exceeds the operational shadow. PASS.
